2197830.name: What A Ball
2197830.description:
WAB What A Ball - A short but intense different kind of ball racing game. Follow Blue's adventure running against MORE THAN 600 Balls racing together. Run up to 300 Km/h. It's a very challenging and hardcore game, Be Ball, Be Blue, Be Brave.

Enjoy this epic story about Blue, get a higher score and find extra bonuses when you finish the story. In this one-player game, you will find beautiful minimalistic stages full of colour. And don't forget to put the sound on.

Easy controls: WASD to move (don't hold keys), Space to Jump, Mouse to turn view.
2197830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
